We don't believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. That's why we take the time to listen and offer tailored support adapted to your reality.

presentation.title: A consulting firm rooted on the ground
presentation.paragraph1: At the heart of KC International SARL is a simple idea: your success is our greatest mission. Since our beginnings in 2021, our consulting firm has been dedicated to helping business owners grow, structure their operations, and overcome their daily challenges.
presentation.paragraph2: We don't believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. That's why we take the time to listen and offer tailored support adapted to your reality. With teams on the ground in Yaoundé (Cameroon), Lagos (Nigeria), and Guangzhou (China), we connect your local projects to global opportunities, bringing you the best of each market.
presentation.paragraph3: Our team brings together passionate professionals who understand the challenges and realities of running a business today. Whether you're a young founder launching a startup, an SME manager looking to better organize your work, or a larger company ready to expand into a new region, we walk alongside you. We are the trusted partner you can rely on to navigate every stage of your growth with confidence.

hero.title: Get to Know Us
hero.paragraph1: At the heart of KC International SARL is a simple idea: your success is our greatest mission. Since our beginnings in 2021, our consulting firm has been dedicated to helping business owners grow, structure their operations, and overcome their daily challenges.

intro.paragraph2: We don't believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. That's why we take the time to listen and offer tailored support adapted to your reality. With teams on the ground in Yaoundé (Cameroon), Lagos (Nigeria), and Guangzhou (China), we connect your local projects to global opportunities, bringing you the best of each market.
intro.paragraph3: Our team brings together passionate professionals who understand the challenges and realities of running a business today. Whether you're a young founder launching a startup, an SME manager looking to better organize your work, or a larger company ready to expand into a new region, we walk alongside you. We are the trusted partner you can rely on to navigate every stage of your growth with confidence.
intro.imageAlt: African professionals supported by KC International SARL

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our core business is to give power back to entrepreneurs. We provide flexible, human, and innovative solutions that free you from administrative burdens, protect your legal compliance, and fuel solid, sustainable growth — because your success is the only true measure of ours.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the trusted guide businesses turn to for transformation. We want to design, hand in hand with you, a bright and secure economic future for our commerce and industries in Africa and beyond, through honest relationships, attentive listening, and impeccable service.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: C-I-T-I-E
values.description: Everything we build at KCI SARL is rooted in our CITIE values. They are the heart of our company and guide how we work alongside you, protect your business, and support you every day with respect and care.
values.closing: These shared values are the foundation that allows us to build strong, sincere, and lasting bonds with each of our clients and partners, here and abroad.

customer.title: Customer Centricity
customer.subtitle: Respecting your needs
customer.description: Your satisfaction and peace of mind are our absolute priorities. We take the time to understand your unique challenges and join forces to go beyond your expectations.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We believe in frank and transparent relationships. Honesty and respect for the rules guide every exchange, because your business deserves total clarity and flawless ethics.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Trust is not asked for — it is earned every day. We build strong, lasting partnerships by always keeping our promises and remaining the faithful partner you can rely on.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We love fresh ideas that simplify your life! We keep learning and seeking creative solutions to improve how we work and help you save time and boost efficiency.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We put our heart and expertise into everything we do. We are committed to delivering products and services of impeccable quality you can count on with complete confidence.

whatWeDo.title: What We Can Do For You
whatWeDo.description: At KCI SARL, we take care of your business by freeing you from daily constraints. Our flexible, high-performance solutions are designed to organize your operations, save you valuable time, and guide you toward success with peace of mind.

accounting.title: 1. Accounting & Tax
items: Accounting & Tax Advisory: We keep your books clean, clear, and well organized every day. We perform internal reviews to safeguard the financial health of your business.
Easy Accounting Tools: We install digital tools suited to your team size and teach you how to use them to track your money with ease.
Business Creation & Future Planning: We guide you step by step through all legal steps to create your company and draft solid business plans to help you secure funding.
Annual Financial Statement Management (DSF): We prepare and file your Statistical and Fiscal Declaration (DSF) in strict compliance with mandatory OHADA zone rules.
Smart Tax Optimization: We find every legal solution to reduce your tax expenses, protect your profits, and improve your cash flow.

fintech.title: 2. Payment Solutions (FinTech)
items: Simplified Bill Payments: Save time by letting us securely manage payment of your water and electricity bills, professional subscriptions, and taxes.
Secure Money Transfers: Reliable, fast solutions to send and receive funds across countries to keep your business activities running smoothly.

sourcing.title: 3. Procurement & Supply (Local & International)
items: Trusted Local Procurement: We identify and negotiate with reliable suppliers in Cameroon, Nigeria, and the sub-region for your daily merchandise, materials, and equipment needs.
International Sourcing: When needed, we find the best suppliers abroad (especially in China), negotiate bulk prices, and verify product quality directly at the factory.
Freight & Cargo Transport: Whether by air, sea, or road, we move your cargo safely while handling all customs and transit formalities.
Turnkey Delivery: We track your parcels and orders all the way through, delivering your goods directly to your shop, factory, or warehouse door.

events.title: 4. Event Management
items: Budget Tracking & Savings: We plan spending for your professional or private events to scrupulously respect your budget while guaranteeing maximum quality.
Audiovisual Equipment & Premium Catering: We set up the best technology (screens, sound, lighting) and select delicious menus to welcome your guests in the best conditions.
Reception & On-Site Staff: We recruit and coordinate dedicated teams — welcoming hostesses, reassuring security agents, and motivated volunteers so your event runs stress-free.

realEstate.title: 5. Your Real Estate Projects
items: Advisory, Purchase & Leasing: We support you in buying, selling, or renting offices, commercial premises, or land while fully securing your transactions.
Property Development & Real Estate Projects: We help owners and investors design their projects, obtain building permits, and manage construction sites from start to finish.

facilities.title: 6. Premises Care & Management
items: Professional Cleaning & Minor Repairs: Careful housekeeping, disinfection, and quick handyman interventions to keep your offices clean and welcoming.
Preventive Maintenance: We regularly monitor your equipment (electrical, plumbing, generators) to repair natural wear before breakdowns occur, saving you unexpected expenses.
Staffing Solutions: We find and select trusted employees (reception agents, technicians, etc.) to strengthen your team according to your needs.

support.title: 7. Personalized Assistance
items: Unique Support: Because every journey is different, we remain fully available to provide flexible, tailored help for any other specific professional or personal need.

cta.title: Join the KCI SARL Family: Let's Build the Future Together
cta.description: Your project is unique, and our greatest joy is helping you bring it to life.

hero.title: Frequently Asked
hero.description: Clear answers on financial management, OHADA compliance, global procurement, logistics, and property solutions.

noResults.title: No questions found
noResults.description: Try adjusting your search terms or explore different categories to find what you're looking for.

logistics.name: Multimodal Logistics, Freight & Global Mobility Services

1.question: How does KC International Ltd stand apart from traditional accounting firms in Cameroon and Nigeria?
1.answer: Traditional firms focus on recording your historical data; KCI Ltd practices active financial engineering. We do not simply keep your books—we strategically analyze your corporate structure, cash flow, and cross-border transactions. By combining deep knowledge of local regulations (such as OHADA law) with the realities of the international markets where we operate (China, Nigeria), we proactively structure your finances to maximize profitability, efficiency, and compliance.

2.question: What is the Statistical and Fiscal Declaration (DSF) and why entrust its management to KCI Ltd?
2.answer: The DSF is the mandatory annual financial statement for all companies in the OHADA zone, including Cameroon. It is a highly complex document. Filing an incorrect or late DSF exposes your business to heavy financial penalties and strict tax audits. KCI Ltd's team of financial experts handles the entire architecture of your DSF: structural audit, rigorous compilation of financial statements, and timely submission to keep your compliance record spotless.

3.question: How do your tax optimization services work without exposing my business to legal risks?
3.answer: True tax optimization is not fraud—it is intelligent use of legislation. Our corporate tax specialists continuously study the Tax Codes of Cameroon and Nigeria to identify tax credits, incentives, exemptions, and legal deductions specific to your sector. We structure your internal transaction flows to legally reduce your tax burden, preserving working capital while keeping your business safe from audit risk.

4.question: Which accounting software do you deploy, and do you offer training for our teams?
4.answer: We integrate and deploy leading financial solutions and ERPs, including Sage Evolution, Excel, and custom Odoo architectures, depending on the size of your business. Our onboarding process is comprehensive: we handle initial system configuration, secure migration of your historical data, and deliver full hands-on training to your teams to ensure immediate operational autonomy.

5.question: Can KCI SARL help with business registration and legal structuring of our company?
5.answer: Yes. We simplify the entire business architecture process for startups, growing SMEs, and international brands. From support with trade registries in Cameroon and Nigeria to structuring legal entities, defining governance models, and drafting strategic business plans that meet bank and investor requirements, we ensure your company is built on solid, compliant foundations.

6.question: What is fractional or part-time financial advisory, and how does it save my business money?
6.answer: Many growing businesses need high-level financial leadership but cannot afford the full-time salary and benefits of a Chief Financial Officer (CFO) or Head Accountant. KCI Ltd's part-time advisory model gives you flexible, on-demand access to our senior financial experts. You receive strategic oversight, audit preparation, and tax optimization exactly when you need it—paying only for productive advisory hours, without the fixed costs of a full-time hire.

7.question: How does KCI SARL ensure my accounting practices remain fully protected from adjustments during government audits?
7.answer: We conduct internal, proactive compliance audits long before the tax administration comes knocking. Our financial team systematically reviews your accounting records, payroll withholdings, VAT returns, and business expense receipts against current tax laws. By identifying and correcting compliance gaps early, we make your accounting files impeccable—ensuring stress-free government audits.

8.question: Can you help my local business transition from informal accounting to international financial reporting standards?
8.answer: Formalizing your accounting is the most crucial step toward securing bank loans and international partnerships. KCI SARL cleans up your financial record history, implements strict digital ledger tracking rules, and trains your teams in corporate cash flow monitoring. We ensure a smooth transition of your operations to verified compliance structures, making your financial statements transparent and attractive to global investors.

9.question: Do you offer financial modeling and valuation services for businesses seeking investment or partnerships?
9.answer: Yes. We design sophisticated, data-driven financial models to project your revenue, operating expenses, and returns over 3 to 5 years. Whether you are presenting to venture capital funds, negotiating a joint venture, or seeking to sell equity in your company, our rigorous valuation models provide the data you need to maximize your negotiating power.

10.question: How do you manage cross-border tax compliance for businesses operating simultaneously in Cameroon and Nigeria?
10.answer: Operating across borders exposes businesses to double taxation risks and complex transfer pricing audits. KCI SARL coordinates your tax strategies across our regional hubs, ensuring your cross-border transactions are legally structured under international trade directives. We align your tax filings in both countries to protect your profit margins from double taxation.

11.question: How does KCI Ltd's strategic presence in Guangzhou, China benefit buyers in West and Central Africa?
11.answer: Buying products abroad carries immense risks related to language barriers, fraud, and quality defects. KCI SARL acts as your trusted physical intermediary in China. Having our own procurement office directly in Guangzhou allows us to negotiate prices face-to-face with factories, verify supplier legitimacy, eliminate hidden middlemen, and inspect goods before they leave Chinese soil—protecting your capital and reputation.

12.question: Which specific product categories or procurement hubs do you manage?
12.answer:
We specialize in high-volume wholesale procurement across five key sectors:
1. Advanced Technology: IT hardware, consumer electronics, and IT networks.
2. Fashion & Aesthetics: Ready-to-wear, textiles, cosmetics, and hair care infrastructure.
3. Agriculture: Heavy farm machinery, fertilizers, and Agri-Tech inputs.
4. Healthcare: Clinical consumables and diagnostic equipment.
5. Industrial Supplies: Construction materials, electromechanical equipment, and packaging solutions.

13.question: What does your factory audit and quality assurance process involve?
13.answer: Before a single container is loaded, our inspection team based in Guangzhou physically visits the manufacturing plant. We verify factory certifications, test production lines, take samples to check quality against your technical specifications or designs, and count inventory. You receive a complete inspection report with video and photographic evidence, ensuring what you receive matches exactly what you purchased.

14.question: Can you customize manufacturing lines for clothing brands, tech companies, or bespoke packaging?
14.answer: Yes. We specialize in private label production and Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) services. Whether you are launching a custom fashion collection, developing electronic devices under your own brand, or seeking customized corporate packaging, we connect you with certified manufacturers capable of meeting your specifications and price targets.

15.question: How does KCI SARL manage bulk procurement for agricultural inputs or industrial packaging?
15.answer: We maintain direct institutional relationships with the world's largest raw material producers and factories. For bulk goods such as fertilizers, construction steel, or eco-friendly packaging cartons, we negotiate volume contracts that allow us to bypass secondary wholesalers. This guarantees you the lowest direct factory prices and stable supply volumes for your plant or farm operation.

16.question: Can individuals use your procurement services, or do you only work with large corporations?
16.answer: We serve both profiles. While we execute major industrial procurement contracts for multinationals and public entrepreneurs, we maintain accessible channels for independent traders, shop owners, tech startups, and agricultural entrepreneurs who want to increase their purchasing power by importing directly from manufacturing centers.

17.question: How do you protect my business from fraudulent suppliers on foreign online marketplaces?
17.answer: Online platforms are full of uncertified sales agents posing as real factories. KCI SARL eliminates this risk entirely. We bypass digital middlemen by verifying suppliers directly on official Chinese manufacturer registries, physically inspecting their production sites, and checking their financial solvency before any money is transferred.

18.question: What is your process for sourcing specialized electromechanical parts or fleet vehicle machinery?
18.answer: Purchasing technical mechanical equipment requires precise alignment with your engineering plans. Our procurement specialists work directly from your technical data sheets or part references (OEM codes). We match these specifications directly with specialized industrial manufacturers in China, ensuring all custom components or fleet machinery integrate perfectly with your existing mechanical systems.

19.question: Do you help businesses source green energy solutions, such as solar installations?
19.answer: Yes. We are highly active in clean energy supply chains. We purchase high-performance solar panels, industrial inverters, and long-life lithium battery storage systems directly from leading Tier-1 renewable energy manufacturers, enabling local developers to build reliable solar infrastructure at highly optimized investment costs.

20.question: What are the minimum order quantities (MOQ) required to procure through KCI SARL?
20.answer: Minimum order quantities depend entirely on manufacturing plants and product type. However, because we consolidate shipments and maintain significant business volume with major production lines, we are frequently able to negotiate lower and more flexible MOQs for our clients than if they tried to buy independently.

21.question: Do your import/export services include full customs clearance at ports?
21.answer: Yes, our logistics transport solutions are end-to-end and stress-free. We manage the entire chain from factory to your warehouse door. Our logistics teams handle all customs formalities, import/export document filing, port transit duty payments, and last-mile road distribution at major ports such as Douala and Lagos.

22.question: What freight transport options do you offer, and how do I choose the best one?
22.answer: We offer tailored air, sea, and road freight solutions based on your budget and urgency. Air freight is ideal for high-value, lightweight, or urgent goods (such as electronics or beauty accessories). Sea freight remains the most economical choice for heavy or bulky industrial goods and bulk containers. Our team provides a clear timeline and cost breakdown for each route to guide you toward the best choice.

23.question: How do you manage last-mile delivery for goods imported into Cameroon and Nigeria?
23.answer: Once your sea container or air freight clears customs, KCI SARL's local transport network takes over. We handle secure loading and deliver your goods directly to your store, warehouse, or final destination using tracked and monitored vehicles, ensuring total security of your stock.

24.question: Which countries do you cover for study and business visa application support?
24.answer: We provide rigorous document preparation and support services for study and business visas to the United Kingdom, Canada, China, India, Russia, and several Schengen Area countries.

25.question: Why should I entrust my visa application to KCI SARL rather than applying on my own?
25.answer: Most visa refusals are caused by minor writing errors, poorly structured financial profiles, or unauthenticated invitation letters. KCI SARL eliminates these risks. We treat your application like a professional audit: we verify your financial statements, check the validity of university or corporate sponsorships, and ensure every document is fully compliant with current embassy requirements to maximize your approval chances.

26.question: Can KCI SARL organize all travel and hospitality logistics for international business delegations?
26.answer: Yes. We design complete global mobility packages for corporate executives and professional associations. This covers visa document preparation, international flight booking, accommodation in top-tier hotels, and coordination of secure local travel in destination countries such as China and Nigeria.

27.question: How does your student visa advisory service help African students who want to study abroad?
27.answer: We support students throughout the international university journey. We help them obtain verified admission letters from accredited international universities, structure parents' or sponsors' financial files to meet visa officer requirements, and prepare for rigorous consular interviews so they can approach their academic future with confidence.

28.question: How does KCI SARL ensure tracking and protection of my valuable goods during international transport?
28.answer: We apply strict security measures for all shipments. Every item consolidated in our warehouses is securely registered, carefully packed, and monitored throughout the journey. We maintain constant communication with our sea and air carriers, allowing us to provide regular updates on your cargo's progress, port to port.

29.question: Can you help with purchasing and customs clearance of specialized vehicles or heavy industrial trucks?
29.answer: Yes. Importing heavy transport vehicles requires specific shipping and customs procedures. Our logistics office coordinates international transport via roll-on/roll-off (Ro-Ro) vessels or secure containers required for these heavy vehicles, and smoothly handles all vehicle registration and automotive customs formalities.

30.question: What documents should I prepare before contacting your visa assistance office?
30.answer: To begin your consultation, you should have your valid international passport, academic transcripts or diplomas (for students), or your company registration documents and invitation details (for business travel). Our team will review these initial documents to design your personalized step-by-step checklist.

31.question: What does the term Facilities Management mean, and how does it protect the value of my real estate?
31.answer: Facilities Management is the systematic management and maintenance of a building's physical environment. Without professional maintenance, a property degrades quickly, causing its market value and rental income to drop. KCI SARL protects your real estate investments by handling deep commercial cleaning, specialized electrical/plumbing repairs, and preventive structural maintenance—ensuring your building remains attractive to tenants and buyers.

32.question: What types of properties does your building technical management team handle?
32.answer: We manage a highly diversified real estate portfolio, including corporate commercial offices, high-density residential buildings, shopping centers, hotel complexes, and industrial warehouses in Cameroon and Nigeria.

33.question: How does your real estate development model work for landowners without construction capital?
33.answer: We offer a powerful strategic development solution for landowners. If you own a well-located plot but lack funds to build, KCI SARL can partner with you. We mobilize investor capital, manage architectural design, obtain urban planning and building permits, and oversee all construction work—transforming your raw land into a highly profitable residential or commercial asset.

34.question: Can KCI SARL help my business find or lease commercial office space or an industrial warehouse?
34.answer: Yes. Our real estate brokerage office handles corporate property search, acquisition, and leasing. We use our local land networks to locate secure, prime locations in key business districts that perfectly match your space needs and activity flows.

35.question: Do you offer outsourced staffing solutions for building management?
35.answer: Yes. Finding reliable staff for building maintenance can be difficult. KCI SARL recruits, trains, and deploys professional support staff directly on your sites. This includes receptionists, front desk staff, site supervisors, professional cleaning agents, and maintenance technicians—while managing all employment contracts and payroll internally.

36.question: What is Preventive Maintenance, and why is it preferable to routine emergency repairs?
36.answer: Emergency repairs are reactive, costly, and disrupt your daily operations. Preventive maintenance is a proactive strategy. KCI SARL schedules regular inspections of plumbing networks, electrical installations, backup generators, and ventilation systems in your buildings. By addressing natural wear at the first signs, we eliminate unexpected breakdowns and save you millions in major structural repair costs.

37.question: How do you protect real estate buyers from fraudulent land transactions in Cameroon and Nigeria?
37.answer: Land scams are a major problem in regional real estate markets. KCI SARL protects your money through strict legal and technical verification. Our real estate team checks property titles with ministries and land registries, has parcel boundaries verified by sworn surveyors, and confirms the seller's legal status before any contract is signed—securing your real estate investments 100%.

38.question: Can KCI SARL manage tenants and collect rent for diaspora property owners?
38.answer: Yes. We specialize in property management for diaspora clients. Our team handles rigorous tenant screening, drafting legal leases, timely rent collection, and ongoing property maintenance. We provide transparent financial reports and securely transfer your funds, allowing you to manage your investments in Africa with peace of mind from abroad.

39.question: What eco-friendly or sustainable options do you offer for building operations?
39.answer: We integrate energy transition into our building management plans. Our technical teams analyze your premises' energy consumption and install low-consumption LED lighting systems, water-saving devices, and alternative solar installations—significantly reducing your utility bills and carbon footprint.

40.question: How can I request a quote for cleaning, repairs, or property management services?
40.answer: You can request a personalized quote by writing directly to our teams from the Contact Us page on our website, emailing sales@kci-ltd.com, or scheduling an on-site technical assessment with our teams in Yaoundé or Lagos.

41.question: What types of payment solutions does your FinTech office offer businesses?
41.answer: Our FinTech service centralizes and accelerates settlement of your business payments. We handle rapid payment of your corporate taxes, cross-border customs duties, water and electricity bills (utility services), and monthly subscriptions to essential business software—preventing your operations and supply chains from suffering payment delays.

42.question: What is the KCI Business Incubator and who can enroll?
42.answer: The KCI Incubator is a growth ecosystem designed to support young entrepreneurs, small-scale farmers, and local artisans. Members benefit from in-depth business management training, access to professional accounting tools, direct mentoring sessions, and concrete pathways to regional funding networks and international export markets to grow their projects.

43.question: What types of professional events can your strategic management team organize?
43.answer: We plan, budget, and deliver premier business events, including international B2B trade conferences, brand product launches, sector seminars, annual general meetings (AGMs), and trade exhibitions. We manage everything from venue sourcing and audiovisual engineering to providing professional hostesses and premium catering services.

44.question: Can you design customized advisory plans suited to a startup's budget?
44.answer: Yes. Our advisory philosophy is built entirely on flexibility. We know early-stage businesses have tight budgets, which is why our support packages are scalable. Our part-time advisory options let you benefit from expert advice in strategy, financial management, and marketing tailored precisely to your growth stage and current budget.

45.question: What is the turnaround time for your team to evaluate a procurement request or business proposal?
45.answer: We prioritize fast, effective communication. Our front office reviews all business proposals, custom procurement requests, or advisory inquiries within 24 to 48 business hours, to provide you with a clear roadmap or schedule an initial online scoping session.

46.question: Can KCI SARL help my business access supply chains and international markets?
46.answer: Yes. Our cross-border network linking Cameroon, Nigeria, and China is built precisely to open global markets to local businesses. We help you import manufacturing raw materials at competitive factory prices, enhance your product packaging and branding to international standards, and master complex compliance rules to export your goods worldwide.

47.question: Do you offer professional market research and competitive analysis services?
47.answer: Yes. Before launching a new product, purchasing land, or expanding into a new region, our research team conducts comprehensive feasibility studies. We analyze consumer demand, competitors' pricing strategies, logistics options, and regulatory requirements—providing the data you need to make safe, profitable business decisions.

48.question: How does your cross-border financial transaction assistance protect my funds from exchange rate risks?
48.answer: Purchasing goods while juggling multiple currencies (such as Central African CFA Franc, Nigerian Naira, Chinese Yuan, and US Dollar) can lead to unexpected losses due to exchange rate fluctuations. KCI SARL's FinTech payment assistance guides you toward optimal financial routing models and secure transaction channels, minimizing currency conversion losses to protect your project budgets.

49.question: What is the first step to become a strategic partner or client of KC International?
49.answer: The first step is to share your needs via our online contact form, or by email at info@kci-ltd.com. We will schedule an initial working session with one of our department directors in Yaoundé, Lagos, or Guangzhou to define your customized solutions plan.

50.question: How does KCI International Ltd support the social initiatives of the KC Foundation?
50.answer: KCI SARL is proud to serve as the commercial and technical pillar of the KC Foundation. We contribute our management expertise, direct mentoring, and material resources to the foundation's initiatives, including the Catch Them Young school programs, Circular Integrated Agriculture projects, and artisan incubators—uniting our company's success with genuine social transformation in Africa.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: How KCI Ltd. collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

collection.title: Data we collect
collection.body: We only collect information you voluntarily provide through our contact forms (name, email, phone, company, subject, and message) or during business interactions with our teams.

usage.title: How we use data
usage.body: This information is used to respond to your requests, prepare quotes, provide commercial follow-up, and improve our services. We do not use it for unsolicited advertising.

sharing.title: Sharing and retention
sharing.body: Your data is not sold to third parties. It may only be shared with technical providers strictly required to operate the website or process your request, under confidentiality obligations.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data by contacting us. We will handle your request as quickly as possible.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: For any question about this policy, email info@kciltd.com or use the contact form on this website.
